prompt: Create a UserProfile screen for ThinkDaily that shows: display name, total problems solved, current streak, and accuracy percentage. Wire it up completely — Riverpod provider, UserStatsRepository interface, ConsumerWidget screen. Hardcoded data for now. Error and loading states must be handled.

assertions.text: Abstract UserStatsRepository interface class is defined separately from the implementation
Provider uses @riverpod annotation for code generation
All three AsyncValue states are handled: data, loading, and error (not just data)
Error state renders an error widget or message (not just returns nothing/empty)
No Color(0xFF...) literals in widget files
Screen displays all four stats: display name, total problems solved, streak, and accuracy
